mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.user_id AS userId, r.title, r.title_image AS titleImage, r.description, r.cooking_time AS cookingTime, r.is_public AS isPublic, r.view_count AS viewCount, r.comment_count AS commentCount, r.like_count AS likeCount, r.created_at AS createdAt,
u.nickname AS nickname, d.name AS difficultyLabel, p.name AS purpose, c.name AS cuisine
FROM recipes r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id JOIN difficulties d ON r.difficulty_id = d.id JOIN purposes p ON r.purpose_id = p.id JOIN cuisines c ON r.cuisine_id = c.id
WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, recipe_id AS recipeId, name, quantity, unit FROM recipe_ingredients WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT id, recipe_id AS recipeId, step_order AS stepOrder, content FROM recipe_steps WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} ORDER BY step_order ASC
SELECT recipe_id AS recipeId, nutrient_name AS nutrientName, amount, unit FROM recipe_nutrients WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE recipes SET view_count = view_count + 1, popularity_score = popularity_score + 1 WHERE id = #{recipeId}
mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.title, r.title_image AS titleImage, r.description, r.cooking_time AS cookingTime, r.like_count AS likeCount, r.comment_count AS commentCount, r.view_count AS viewCount, r.is_public AS isPublic, r.is_ai_generated AS isAiGenerated, u.nickname AS authorNickname, d.name AS difficultyName, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAtStr
FROM recipes r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id JOIN difficulties d ON r.difficulty_id = d.id
WHERE r.is_public = 1 AND r.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.id, r.title, r.title_image AS titleImage, r.description, r.cooking_time AS cookingTime, r.like_count AS likeCount, r.comment_count AS commentCount, r.view_count AS viewCount, r.is_public AS isPublic, r.is_ai_generated AS isAiGenerated, u.nickname AS authorNickname, d.name AS difficultyName, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAtStr
FROM recipes r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id JOIN difficulties d ON r.difficulty_id = d.id
WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.id, r.title, r.title_image AS titleImage, r.description, r.cooking_time AS cookingTime, r.like_count AS likeCount, r.comment_count AS commentCount, r.view_count AS viewCount, r.is_public AS isPublic, r.is_ai_generated AS isAiGenerated, u.nickname AS authorNickname, d.name AS difficultyName, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAtStr
FROM recipes r JOIN recipe_likes rl ON r.id = rl.recipe_id JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id JOIN difficulties d ON r.difficulty_id = d.id
WHERE rl.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY rl.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipe_view_log (user_id, recipe_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{recipeId}, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.title, r.title_image AS titleImage, r.description, r.cooking_time AS cookingTime, r.like_count AS likeCount, r.comment_count AS commentCount, r.view_count AS viewCount, r.is_public AS isPublic, r.is_ai_generated AS isAiGenerated, u.nickname AS authorNickname, d.name AS difficultyName, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAtStr
FROM recipes r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id JOIN difficulties d ON r.difficulty_id = d.id
WHERE r.is_public = 1 AND r.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE recipes SET deleted_at = NOW(), like_count = 0, comment_count = 0 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
